summary: Matched several grcastle functions and related data, added castle-specific ground variable typing, recovered a return value for lb_80011A50, and updated headers/prototypes to reflect recovered signatures. Automated report records 4 new matches and 5 additional grcastle improvements.

key_files.role: Primary implementation: adds grcastle data tables, stage data, local params/static state, and matched or improved grCastle functions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grcastle.c adds grCs_803E0FE8, grCs_803E0FF4, grCs_803E11A4, grCastleParams, grCs_804D45E4, grCs_804D6970, grCs_804D6974
raw_diff: grCastle_801CD37C, grCastle_801CD4D0, grCastle_801CD8A8, grCastle_801CF7B0, grCastle_801D0D24 bodies added or improved
text_corpus: bot report lists grCastle_801CD37C, grCastle_801CF7B0, grCastle_801D0D24 as new 100% matches and grCastle_801CD4D0/grCastle_801CD8A8 as improved

key_files.role: Adds castle ground variable fields and a second castle union arm for GObj and state fields.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCastle_GroundVars gains pad to 0xE0 and HSD_Spline** xE0
raw_diff: new grCastle_GroundVars2 with HSD_GObj* xC4/xC8/xCC and s16 xD0/xD2

key_files.role: Updates recovered prototypes and removes extern declarations for callback arrays now defined locally as const arrays.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCastle_801CD4D0 prototype changed from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to HSD_GObj* grCastle_801CD4D0(int)
raw_diff: grCastle_801CE19C prototype changed to void grCastle_801CE19C(Ground_GObj*)
raw_diff: grCastle_801D0D84 prototype changed to void grCastle_801D0D84(f32)

key_files.role: Changes lb_80011A50 implementation to return the struct pointer produced by lb_800100B0.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lb_80011A50 return type changed from void to struct lb_80011A50_t*
raw_diff: final call changed from lb_800100B0(&x2C, arg2) to return lb_800100B0(&x2C, arg2)

key_files.role: Updates lb_80011A50 header declaration to match recovered return type.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lb_80011A50 declaration returns struct lb_80011A50_t*

what_changed: Added grcastle data definitions in grcastle.c: callback arrays, StageCallbacks table, StageData, S16Vec3 table, grCastleParams typedef, and static globals for stage params and lb_80011A50_t state.

Implemented grCastle_801CD37C, including Ground_801C49F8 params setup, stage_info bit updates, several grCastle_801CD4D0 calls, mpLib_80057BC0 calls, Ground setup calls, and lb_80011A50 initialization.
Implemented or improved grCastle_801CD4D0 to create a ground GObj, install callbacks from grCs_803E0FF4, set GX link/proc behavior, report failure via OSReport, and return the GObj.

Implemented grCastle_801CD8A8 using two loops over 12 HSD_Spline pointers in gp->gv.castle.xE0, first calling grCastle_801D0D84(totalLength), then freeing via grLib_801C9B8C and calling grCastle_801D0D24.
Replaced some raw pointer arithmetic on grCs_804D6970 in grCastle_801CDFD8 with grCastleParams field accesses xA and x8.
Implemented grCastle_801CF7B0 to spawn stage GObjs 20, 19, and 18 into gp->gv.castle2 fields and compute xD2 from grCastleParams x0/x2 with HSD_Randi.
Implemented grCastle_801D0D24 to update grCs_804D6974->unk_scale based on grCs_804D45E4 and HSD_Randf.
Added castle ground variable typing in gr/types.h, including HSD_Spline** xE0 and a second castle union arm for GObj pointers and s16 state.
Updated grcastle and lb_00F9 headers to remove UNK signatures where the diff recovers concrete return and argument types.
Changed lb_80011A50 from a void wrapper to returning the lb_800100B0 result, allowing grcastle to store the returned struct pointer.

smart_moves.text: Recovered function signatures in headers at the same time as bodies and callsites, rather than keeping source-local or UNK prototypes.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grcastle.h updates grCastle_801CD4D0, grCastle_801CE19C, grCastle_801D0D84
raw_diff: lb_00F9.h updates lb_80011A50 return type

smart_moves.text: Introduced typed ground-variable structures and a grCastleParams struct to replace some raw offset-based access.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: types.h adds grCastle_GroundVars xE0 and grCastle_GroundVars2
raw_diff: grCastle_801CDFD8 changes params offset reads to params->xA and params2->x8

smart_moves.text: Used compact natural loops for repeated spline processing in grCastle_801CD8A8 instead of spelling out repeated blocks.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCastle_801CD8A8 has two for (i = 0; i < 12; i++) loops over gp->gv.castle.xE0

smart_moves.text: Kept a narrow library signature fix tied to an observed grcastle use: lb_80011A50 now returns the lb_800100B0 pointer consumed by grCs_804D6974.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a stage function stores the result of a helper, check whether the helper's true signature returns an object pointer and update the owning header and implementation together.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lb_80011A50 return type changed to struct lb_80011A50_t* and returns lb_800100B0

decomp_lessons.lesson: GroundVars union arms can be expanded with stage-specific temporary fields when matched code shows repeated accesses to typed stage state.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCastle_GroundVars2 added and used by grCastle_801CF7B0

decomp_lessons.lesson: Repeated stage resource cleanup over an indexed array can be represented as ordinary for loops when the body differs only by index and null checks.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCastle_801CD8A8 loops over 12 xE0 entries for totalLength processing and cleanup

naming_conventions.text: New file-local grcastle data keeps address-style names such as grCs_803E0FF4, grCs_803E11A4, grCs_804D45E4, grCs_804D6970, and grCs_804D6974 rather than assigning speculative semantic names.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grcastle.c data declarations use grCs_address-style identifiers

naming_conventions.text: Recovered but still not fully semantic struct fields use offset-style names x0, x2, x4, x8, xA, xC, xC4, xC8, xCC, xD0, xD2, and xE0.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCastle_GroundVars and grCastle_GroundVars2 field names

naming_conventions.text: Clear local role names are used for common object pointers, such as gobj, gp, callbacks, params, and params2.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK(4) appears in grCastle_801CD37C, including inside the nested Vec3 initialization block.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCastle_801CD37C includes PAD_STACK(4) near function start and before lb_80011A50 call
text_corpus: bot report says grCastle_801CD37C became 100.00%
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: PAD_STACK is a matching tactic that should stay narrow and verifier-backed; this PR slice has an automated match report but no human explanation of why padding was required.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: A temporary grCastleParams struct replaces raw offsets for some stage params while preserving address-style field names where semantics are not proven.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCastle_801CDFD8 uses params->xA and params2->x8
raw_diff: grCastle_801CF7B0 uses grCs_804D6970->x2 and x0

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Callback table reconstruction supports stage object setup in grCastle_801CD4D0.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCastle_801CD4D0 indexes grCs_803E0FF4[gobj_id] and invokes callback0/callback2/callback3

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Automated report records exact matches for three functions and an .sbss item, plus near/partial improvements for data and additional functions.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists grCastle_801CD37C, grCastle_801CF7B0, grCastle_801D0D24, and .sbss as new matches
text_corpus: bot report lists .data, grCastle_801CD4D0, grCastle_801CD8A8, .sdata2, and .sdata as improvements

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: Report for GALE01 shows matched code +572 bytes (+0.01%) and matched data +8 bytes, with 4 new matches and 5 improvements in unmatched grcastle items.

follow_up_queries: grCastle_801CD4D0 OSReport couldn t get gobj

evidence_refs: raw_diff: full diff available and not truncated
changed_files: five changed files with line counts
text_corpus: empty PR body and one automated bot report
notes: Diff evidence is strong for changed files, code shape, signatures, and local tactics.
Automated report supports match/improvement claims, but the slice does not include local build logs, objdiff screenshots, or human review discussion.
PR body is empty and there are no human review comments, so reviewer intent and rationale for tactics such as PAD_STACK cannot be inferred.

Data table ownership and exact split rationale are visible in the diff but not separately justified by comments; treat broader data-layout lessons as curator candidates, not accepted global standards.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Update helper return signatures when a matched caller stores the returned object
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2244 changed lb_80011A50 from void to returning struct lb_80011A50_t* because grCastle_801CD37C stores the result in grCs_804D6974, and the implementation returns lb_800100B0. This is a concrete example of recovering a true helper return type and updating the owning header.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lb_00F9.h declaration changed to struct lb_80011A50_t*

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use typed GroundVars fields for recovered stage state
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2244 adds grCastle_GroundVars.xE0 as HSD_Spline** and grCastle_GroundVars2 for several HSD_GObj* and s16 fields, then uses those fields in grCastle_801CD8A8 and grCastle_801CF7B0 instead of leaving all accesses as raw offsets.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCastle_801CD8A8 and grCastle_801CF7B0 use gp->gv.castle/castle2

source_update_candidates.title: grcastle stage data and callback tables live in src/melee/gr/grcastle.c
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2244 adds grCs_803E0FE8, grCs_803E0FF4, and grCs_803E11A4 in src/melee/gr/grcastle.c, tying grcastle StageData to /GrCs.dat and the grCastle_801CD37C/grCastle_801CD338/grCastle_801CD4A0/grCastle_801CD4A4/grCastle_801CD4C8/grCastle_801D0B04/grCastle_801D0B0C callbacks.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path fact for future grcastle data/callback lookup; needs curator review before adding to source-owned facts.

source_update_candidates.title: lb_80011A50 returns lb_800100B0-created lb_80011A50_t pointer
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2244 changes lb_80011A50 in src/melee/lb/lb_00F9.c and .h to return struct lb_80011A50_t*, with the function returning lb_800100B0(&x2C, arg2).
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lb_80011A50 signature changed from void to struct lb_80011A50_t*
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful signature/call-return relationship for future library decomp work; should be checked against current source before promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: grcastle GroundVars union has separate castle and castle2 usages
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2244 adds HSD_Spline** xE0 to grCastle_GroundVars and a separate grCastle_GroundVars2 union arm containing three HSD_GObj* fields and two s16 fields. grCastle_801CD8A8 uses gp->gv.castle.xE0, while grCastle_801CF7B0 uses gp->gv.castle2.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential source-owned path/type fact for future stage variable recovery; current source should be checked before adding.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that PAD_STACK is generally required for grcastle setup functions; this slice only shows two PAD_STACK(4) uses in grCastle_801CD37C plus an automated match report.
Do not claim grCastle_801CD4D0 or grCastle_801CD8A8 fully matched; the bot report lists them as 99.95% and 86.15% improvements, not new 100% matches.
Do not infer human reviewer approval rationale or requested changes; there are no review comments and the PR body is empty.
Do not promote the exact semantic meaning of grCastleParams fields or grCastle_GroundVars2 fields beyond their offset-style names and observed uses.
